name: Mîr-Warmhaven
personality: Mîr-Warmhaven's glowing × eyes mark every blocked PR and unresolved merge conflict with the steady patience of a capybara who has survived seventeen release freezes. This shiny, hatless creature settles into long CI queues like a hot spring — comfortably waiting where others would panic-push to main.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
